title: salvia lutescens var. crenata
intro: Salvia lutescens var. crenata, also known as 'Golden Creeping Sage', is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family and native to Mexico. Traditionally, Salvia lutescens var. crenata has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties that can help alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Salvia lutescens var. crenata include its ability to support digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation. Salvia lutescens var. crenata can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or dried and used in capsule or tincture form, allowing individuals to harness its potential benefits in a variety of ways.
